triageCategories.label: RESPOND
triageCategories.description: Needs a reply — someone is waiting

triageCategories.label: BILLS / FINANCE
triageCategories.description: Bills due, statements, bank alerts, tax docs

triageCategories.label: APPOINTMENTS
triageCategories.description: Medical, dental, auto, personal services — confirmations and reminders

triageCategories.label: HOME / FAMILY
triageCategories.description: School notices, HOA, household services, family coordination

triageCategories.label: TRAVEL
triageCategories.description: Bookings, confirmations, itineraries, loyalty — not promos

triageCategories.label: SHOPPING / ORDERS
triageCategories.description: Order confirmations, shipping, returns — not deal alerts

triageCategories.label: SUBSCRIPTIONS / RENEWALS
triageCategories.description: Renewal notices, payment failures, plan changes — not upsells

triageCategories.label: FITNESS / WELLNESS
triageCategories.description: Gym, classes, health apps, wellness programs

triageCategories.label: HOBBIES
triageCategories.description: Clubs, groups, events, gear — related to personal interests

triageCategories.label: VOLUNTEER
triageCategories.description: Nonprofit roles, community service, board duties

triageCategories.label: NEWSLETTERS
triageCategories.description: Opted-in reads worth scanning — not spam

noiseFilters.description: Within each category, only surface transactional/actionable emails. Reject marketing disguised as category content.
